## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:ci` passes (frontend)
- [ ] `mage test` passes (backend, if applicable)
- [ ] `mage -v build:linux` and `npm run build` succeed
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or configuration changed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data committed
- [ ] Security-relevant defaults remain fail-closed (if this PR touches the backend)
